panels.title: Total recurring per year
panels.description: Detected subscriptions (annualized) plus 12× the average monthly spend on Bills/Subscriptions/Memberships/Gym categories — best estimate of fixed annual commitments.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH detected AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(annualized_cents), 0) AS v FROM subscriptions WHERE is_active = 1), bills AS (SELECT COALESCE(-SUM(amount_cents), 0) * 12.0 / 12 AS v FROM spending WHERE category_name IN ('Bills', 'Bills (Flexible)') AND date >= date('now', '-365 days')) SELECT (detected.v + bills.v) / 100.0 AS value FROM detected, bills

WITH detected AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(annualized_cents), 0) AS v FROM subscriptions WHERE is_active = 1), bills AS (SELECT COALESCE(-SUM(amount_cents), 0) AS v FROM spending WHERE category_name IN ('Bills', 'Bills (Flexible)') AND date >= date('now', '-365 days')) SELECT (detected.v / 12.0 + bills.v / 12.0) / 100.0 AS value FROM detected, bills
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM subscriptions WHERE is_active = 0

panels.title: All recurring commitments — detected subs + recurring-category spend
panels.description: Union of (a) cadence-detected subscriptions and (b) per-payee monthly average for transactions in Bills/Subscriptions/Memberships/Gym categories. The latter catches recurring spend the cadence detector misses (varying amounts, irregular dates).

targets.rawQueryText: WITH cat_recurring AS (SELECT COALESCE(payee_name, '(none)') AS payee, category_name AS category, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(-AVG(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS median_eur, ROUND(-SUM(amount_cents) * 12.0 / 12 / 100.0, 2) AS per_year_eur, MAX(date) AS last_seen FROM spending WHERE category_name IN ('Bills', 'Bills (Flexible)', 'Subscriptions', 'Donations & Memberships', 'Gym & Fitness') AND date >= date('now', '-365 days') GROUP BY payee_name, category_name HAVING n >= 2) SELECT 'detected' AS Source, payee_name AS Payee, '(via detector)' AS Category, cadence AS Cadence, ROUND(median_cents / 100.0, 2) AS "Median (EUR)", ROUND(annualized_cents / 100.0, 2) AS "Per year (EUR)", count AS Count, last_seen AS "Last seen", days_since_last AS "Days since" FROM subscriptions WHERE is_active = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'category' AS Source, payee AS Payee, category AS Category, '?' AS Cadence, median_eur AS "Median (EUR)", per_year_eur AS "Per year (EUR)", n AS Count, last_seen AS "Last seen", CAST(julianday('now') - julianday(last_seen) AS INTEGER) AS "Days since" FROM cat_recurring ORDER BY "Per year (EUR)" DESC

panels.title: Recurring spend per month (creep detector)
panels.description: Total spend in Bills/Subscriptions/Memberships/Gym broken down by category, last 18 months. Slow-rising lines = subscription creep.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', month || '-01') AS INTEGER) AS time, category_name AS metric, -SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0 AS value FROM spending WHERE category_name IN ('Bills', 'Bills (Flexible)', 'Subscriptions', 'Donations & Memberships', 'Gym & Fitness') AND date >= date('now', '-18 months') GROUP BY month, category_name ORDER BY month

panels.title: Stale subscriptions — was recurring, recently silent

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT payee_name AS Payee, cadence AS Cadence, ROUND(median_cents / 100.0, 2) AS "Was: median (EUR)", ROUND(annualized_cents / 100.0, 2) AS "Was: per year", count AS Count, first_seen AS "First seen", last_seen AS "Last seen", days_since_last AS "Days since" FROM subscriptions WHERE is_active = 0 ORDER BY days_since_last ASC

panels.title: New recurring this month — payees first seen since the 1st
panels.description: Anomaly surface: did you intentionally sign up for these?

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT payee_name AS Payee, COUNT(*) AS Txns, ROUND(-SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS "Spend so far (EUR)", MIN(date) AS "First seen", MAX(date) AS "Last seen" FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', 'start of month') AND payee_name NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT payee_name FROM transactions WHERE payee_name IS NOT NULL AND date < date('now', 'start of month')) AND payee_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY payee_name ORDER BY -SUM(amount_cents) DESC
